title: Test parallelism: isolate vs sharing
scenario_context: Test files share a global cache. With isolate:false they share between files, causing flakes.
what_should_be_tested: Each test file has its own module graph.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. isolate:true (default) gives each file its own module instance.
2. Faster startup but file boundary clean.
3. Singletons reset via beforeEach.

title: Testing aria-live region updates
scenario_context: Status changes announced via aria-live. Tests assert text but not the region attribute.
what_should_be_tested: Updates happen inside a region with proper aria-live politeness.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. role=status implies aria-live=polite.
2. role=alert implies aria-live=assertive.
3. Test the role; politeness implicit.

title: Testing OpenAPI compliance
scenario_context: OpenAPI spec drifts from implementation. Doc lies.
what_should_be_tested: Generated/documented schema matches actual responses.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Parse openapi.yaml; validate live responses against schema.
2. Drift = failing test.

title: Property: idempotent action repeated yields same state
scenario_context: setTag(item,tag) twice should leave one tag, not two.
what_should_be_tested: Idempotence across arbitrary inputs.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. f(f(x)) === f(x) for idempotent ops.
2. fc.array generates duplicate-friendly sequences.

title: Detecting tests that only assert on truthy
scenario_context: `expect(x).toBeTruthy()` passes for many values; mutants can pass too.
what_should_be_tested: Precise expected values.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: toBeTruthy / toBeFalsy when specific value known
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Replace toBeTruthy with toBe(specificValue).
2. Loose matchers let mutants survive.

title: Testing across Node version matrix
scenario_context: Lib supports Node 18, 20, 22. Tested on 22 only; subtle behavior diverges.
what_should_be_tested: Suite passes on each supported version.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. CI matrix runs full suite per Node version.
2. fail-fast: false so all versions report.
solution:
// .github/workflows/test.yml
/*
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        node: ['18.20', '20.18', '22.x']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: {node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}}
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm test
*/

title: Testing client-side route guards with role check
scenario_context: Admin route should redirect non-admins. Bug: role check used wrong field.
what_should_be_tested: Per-role access correct.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Test admin → renders; member → redirect.
2. Cover all defined roles.

title: Testing CSP report-only mode
scenario_context: Migrating to strict CSP. Report-only mode logs violations without blocking.
what_should_be_tested: App generates no violation reports in normal usage.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Server includes Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only.
2. Test catches violation reports via fixture endpoint.
3. Asserts zero reports for normal flows.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Migration ships CSP that blocks features.

title: Testing query timeout enforcement
scenario_context: Slow query DoS risk. Bug: no timeout, expensive query hangs handler.
what_should_be_tested: Query exceeding limit cancelled.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Statement timeout set per connection or per query.
2. Test: trigger long-running query (pg_sleep) → returns 504 within timeout.

title: Property: filter pipeline order matters
scenario_context: filter(unique).filter(sort) vs filter(sort).filter(unique) — different results. Bug: refactor changed order.
what_should_be_tested: Specific order produces expected output.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Properties that pass on any order
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Property: equality with reference (ordered) impl.
2. Catches order swaps.

title: Testing inside iframe (jsdom multiple windows)
scenario_context: Component renders inside iframe; jsdom default is single window.
what_should_be_tested: Component works in cross-frame context.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. jsdom can create child window via document.createElement('iframe').contentWindow.
2. Render React into iframe's document.

title: Testing CSS module class application
scenario_context: styles.error renders empty class in tests; assertions on className miss styling.
what_should_be_tested: That correct CSS module class applied; setup transforms modules.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. identity-obj-proxy makes styles.x === 'x' in tests.
2. Asserts on classname string.
3. Real styles applied via Storybook for visual.

title: Testing event order in eventual consistency
scenario_context: Order events: created → paid → shipped. Bug: race in handlers made shipped sometimes precede paid.
what_should_be_tested: Final state consistent regardless of event arrival order.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Handlers should be idempotent and order-independent for valid event sets.
2. Test: deliver in reverse order; final state same.

title: Killing block-statement mutations
scenario_context: Stryker's BlockStatement removes function body. Tests must exercise the function's effect.
what_should_be_tested: Each function's observable effect.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Empty-body mutation survives if no test asserts on what function did.
2. Side-effect functions assert side effect; pure functions assert return.

title: CI test selection by changed files
scenario_context: All tests run per PR; 20 min. Only 2% relevant.
what_should_be_tested: Selective: only tests touching changed code.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. vitest related <files>: runs tests touched by changed files.
2. nx/turbo affected runners equivalent.
3. Full suite on main branch as safety net.

title: Testing component fragmentation under React.memo
scenario_context: Heavily memoized tree; some components don't re-render when they should.
what_should_be_tested: Render counts: changes propagate where intended.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Render counter component (test-023 pattern).
2. Assert N renders for N prop changes.
3. Equality function for memo is part of the test.

title: Testing screen reader text alternatives
scenario_context: Image button has no alt or aria-label. Screen readers say 'button'.
what_should_be_tested: Every interactive element has accessible name.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. axe rule 'button-name' catches.
2. Manual assert: getByRole('button',{name:/expected/i}) — name must match.

title: Testing soft-delete UNIQUE constraint
scenario_context: users.email UNIQUE; soft-deleting and recreating user with same email fails.
what_should_be_tested: After soft delete, same email reusable.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Partial UNIQUE index: WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.
2. Test seeds + deletes + recreates.

title: Property: array slice obeys bounds
scenario_context: Custom slice fn. Bug: negative indices behaved differently from Array.prototype.slice.
what_should_be_tested: Equivalence with built-in slice.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Property: customSlice(arr,a,b) === arr.slice(a,b) for all valid inputs.

title: Test culture: writing the test before the bug fix
scenario_context: Bug reported. Fix without test. Bug regresses 3 months later.
what_should_be_tested: Process: every bug fix includes a failing test that proves the bug, then the fix.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Test that doesn't actually exercise the bug
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Reproduce bug in a failing test FIRST.
2. See it fail.
3. Fix code.
4. See it pass.
5. PR includes both.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Bugs regress; fixes get reverted; tribal knowledge lost.

title: Testing TypeScript only at type level
scenario_context: Generic helper has tricky inference. Runtime tests pass; types wrong.
what_should_be_tested: Type-level behavior pinned.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. vitest --typecheck enables type assertion.
2. expectTypeOf checks at compile.
3. Per-API type guarantees.

title: Testing context with multiple providers (composition)
scenario_context: App wraps in Theme + Auth + Toast providers. Test setup repetition.
what_should_be_tested: Custom render wrapper provides all defaults.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. tests/render.ts wraps in real providers.
2. Each test uses it instead of @testing-library render.

title: Testing native input file selection
scenario_context: Custom-styled file input with hidden native. Click on visible label opens picker. Tests use setInputFiles directly; the label-click path untested.
what_should_be_tested: That label click correctly opens file picker (file selection via setInputFiles works).
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Label associates via htmlFor; click on label focuses input.
2. setInputFiles on the hidden input works.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Hidden input invisible to label clicks.

title: Testing request body parsers (JSON vs form vs multipart)
scenario_context: App handles multiple content types. JSON parser configured per-route; form sometimes leaks JSON parser.
what_should_be_tested: Each route accepts its declared content type only.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Route declares accepted type; reject others with 415.
2. Test each route with each type.

title: Property: tree flatten preserves all leaves
scenario_context: flattenTree(root) returns leaves array. Bug: nested loops skipped some.
what_should_be_tested: Output length === total leaves in input.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Generate random trees; count leaves recursively.
2. flatten().length === count.

title: Killing string concatenation mutants
scenario_context: `return 'Hello, ' + name`. Mutating + to '' survives if test asserts only on name presence.
what_should_be_tested: Exact concatenated output.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Assert full output: 'Hello, Ada' === 'Hello, Ada'.

title: Test resource leak detection
scenario_context: Suite leaks connections; CI exits cleanly but staging has open handles.
what_should_be_tested: No leaked timers/sockets after suite ends.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. vitest --reporter=verbose surfaces open handles.
2. Per-test cleanup of timers, sockets, DB.

title: Testing custom render with router
scenario_context: Components depend on useNavigate. Tests outside RouterProvider crash.
what_should_be_tested: Router context always available in test render.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Custom render wraps in MemoryRouter with optional initial entries.

title: Testing app within a custom browser context
scenario_context: Locale set via Accept-Language header. Default tests use en-US; bug for Hebrew (RTL) layout.
what_should_be_tested: Per-context locale and direction.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. context.locale, context.timezoneId allow per-context settings.
2. Test RTL: assert dir='rtl' on root.

title: Testing JWT refresh flow
scenario_context: Access token expires in 15min; refresh token rotates. Bug: rotation skipped on slow requests; same refresh used twice.
what_should_be_tested: Refresh issues new token + new refresh; old refresh rejected on reuse.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Refresh endpoint atomically rotates: invalidate old, issue new.
2. Test: refresh twice with same → second fails.
